data.name: DigitsAfterComma
data.value: Digits After The Decimal Point In Volume Values

data.name: VisibleProportion
data.value: Proportion By Visible Part Of The Chart

data.name: TooSmallRows
data.value: Price Rows Height Too Small For Render

data.name: DaysLookBackDescription
data.value: Refers to the number of previous days taken into account when calculating an indicator

data.name: BarsRangeDescription
data.value: This property is used to specify the number of candles that should be aggregated before the main calculation takes place.

data.name: DeltaFilterDescription
data.value: This property is used to set a filter on the delta for a specific price level. If the value is positive, the filter will only allow price levels where the delta is greater than or equal to the value. If the value is negative, the filter will only allow price levels where the delta is less than or equal to the value.

data.name: DeltaImbalanceDescription
data.value: This property is used to filter out price levels based on the difference between the percentage of ask volume and the percentage of bid volume. If the value is positive, the filter will only allow price levels where the percentage of ask volume is greater than or equal to the value. If the value is negative, the filter will only allow price levels where the percentage of bid volume is greater than or equal to the absolute value.

data.name: MaxAvgTradeDescription
data.value: This property is used to determine the maximum average trade required for a price level to be considered valid. The average trade is calculated by dividing the volume of a price level by the number of ticks on that level. If the resulting value is greater than this property, the price level will be excluded from consideration.

data.name: MaxPercentDescription
data.value: Property is used to set the maximum volume percentage allowed for a price level to be considered valid. The volume percentage is calculated by dividing the volume of a price level by the total volume of the candle and multiplying by 100. If the resulting value is greater than this property, the price level will be excluded from consideration. If the property is set to 0, it will not be used in the validation check.

data.name: MinAvgTradeDescription
data.value: This property is used to determine the minimum average trade required for a price level to be considered valid. The average trade is calculated by dividing the volume of a price level by the number of ticks on that level. If the resulting value is less than this property, the price level will be excluded from consideration.

data.name: MinPercentDescription
data.value: Property is used to set the minimum volume percentage required for a price level to be considered valid. The volume percentage is calculated by dividing the volume of a price level by the total volume of the candle and multiplying by 100. If the resulting value is less than this property, the price level will be excluded from consideration. If the property is set to 0, it will not be used in the validation check.

data.name: PipsFromHighDescription
data.value: This property sets the maximum distance in ticks from the candle's high price that a level can be considered as valid. If the distance between the level and the candle's high price exceeds the value of this property the level will not be considered as valid.

data.name: PipsFromLowDescription
data.value: This property sets the maximum distance in ticks from the candle's low price that a level can be considered as valid. If the distance between the level and the candle's low price exceeds the value of this property the level will not be considered as valid.

data.name: PriceRangeDescription
data.value: It determines the range of prices that will be aggregated in the calculation. The range is defined by the number of ticks specified in the parameter.

data.name: MaximumVolumeDescription
data.value: Shows line of maximum value of volume for specifyed amount of bars

data.name: ReverseAlertDescription
data.value: Appears on divergences(candle is positive and delta is negative or visa versa)

data.name: VolumeLabelDescription
data.value: When bars are wide, shows values of volumes on each bar

data.name: OHLCPlusDescription
data.value: Extended price levels indicator showing OHLC, Equilibrium, POC and Value Area levels for

data.name: OverrideColorInSchemesDescription
data.value: If enabled, this line will use its own Color even when visual semantic schemes are active.

data.name: OverrideWidthInSchemesDescription
data.value: If enabled, this level will use its own line width even when visual semantic schemes are active.

data.name: OverrideStyleInSchemesDescription
data.value: If enabled, this level will use its own line style even when visual semantic schemes are active.

data.name: VisualMode_Ruleset_Description
data.value: Visualization driven by semantic rules and palettes.

data.name: HVN_ThresholdPct_Description
data.value: A price level is considered HVN when its volume is at or above this percentage of the profile POC volume.

data.name: HVN_GapToleranceTicks_Description
data.value: Allows small gaps (in ticks) inside an HVN band to keep nearby high-volume levels grouped.

data.name: HVN_OcclusionTicks_Description
data.value: Minimum vertical distance (in ticks) required between HVN bands of different periods to avoid visual overlap.

data.name: LVN_ThresholdPct_Description
data.value: A price level is considered LVN when its volume is below this percentage of the profile POC volume.

data.name: LVN_GapToleranceTicks_Description
data.value: Allows small gaps (in ticks) inside an LVN band to keep nearby low-volume levels grouped.

data.name: LVN_OcclusionTicks_Description
data.value: Minimum vertical distance (in ticks) required between LVN bands of different periods to avoid visual overlap.

data.name: LVN_MinPocVol_Description
data.value: Do not compute LVN bands until the profile POC volume reaches this value. Prevents LVN noise early in the period.

data.name: LVN_TailFilterMinTicks_Description
data.value: Excludes low-volume tail areas near the high and low of the profile from LVN detection.

data.name: LVN_TailFilterRangePct_Description
data.value: Excludes low-volume tail areas near the high and low of the profile from LVN detection, using a percentage of the profile range. (0 = disabled).

data.name: ShowThresholdLinesDescription
data.value: Show horizontal threshold lines in the Volume panel.

data.name: ThresholdSourceDescription
data.value: Select fixed thresholds or dynamic Welford thresholds.

data.name: SessionWindowModeDescription
data.value: Session window used to reset dynamic thresholds.

data.name: RthStartDescription
data.value: Start time of Regular Trading Hours (exchange time).

data.name: RthEndDescription
data.value: End time of Regular Trading Hours (exchange time).

data.name: SamplesForMeanStdDescription
data.value: Minimum samples required before dynamic thresholds become active.

data.name: LabelFillColorDescription
data.value: Sets the background color of the label.

data.name: ShowVolumePerSecondDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about volume per second.

data.name: ShowDeltaDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about delta.

data.name: ShowDeltaPerVolumeDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about delta per volume.

data.name: ShowDeltaChangeDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about the difference between the delta of the current candle and the delta of the previous one.

data.name: ShowMaximumDeltaDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about maximum delta.

data.name: ShowMinimumDeltaDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about minimum delta.

data.name: ShowVolumesDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display volume information.

data.name: ShowTradesCountDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about the number of trades.

data.name: ShowCandleHeightDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about the height of the candle (in currency).

data.name: ShowCandleDurationDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about the time duration of the candle.

data.name: ShowCandleTimeDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about the start time of the candle.

data.name: ShowSessionVolumeDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display cumulative volume information within a session.

data.name: ShowSessionDeltaDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about session delta.

data.name: ShowSessionDeltaPerVolumeDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about session delta per volume.

data.name: ShowAsksDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about ask volumes.

data.name: ShowBidsDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display information about bid volumes.

data.name: UseAlertDescription
data.value: This setting enables alert notifications for specific conditions or events as defined by the indicator. When activated, the indicator will send an alert.

data.name: AlertFilterDescription
data.value: Sets the value at which the alert is triggered.

data.name: AlertFileDescription
data.value: This parameter allows users to specify the name of a custom audio file for alert sounds. Users can select a WAV file that will be played whenever an alert condition is triggered. The chosen WAV file should be located in the folder C:\Program Files (x86)\ATAS Platform\Sounds.

data.name: Use4ColorSystemDescription
data.value: If true, uses slope-based colors. If false, uses simple zero-line colors.

data.name: SimpleColorDescription
data.value: Used only when the 4-Color System is disabled.

data.name: PriceSignalOffsetTicksDescription
data.value: Vertical offset for price markers, in ticks.

data.name: ShowVisualAlertsDescription
data.value: Show threshold markers on the price chart.

data.name: VisualUpThresholdsDescription
data.value: Threshold level used for bullish visual alerts.

data.name: VisualDownThresholdsDescription
data.value: Threshold level used for bearish visual alerts.

data.name: AudioAlertsDescription
data.value: Play sound when thresholds are crossed.

data.name: AudioUpThresholdsDescription
data.value: Threshold level used for bullish audio alerts.

data.name: AudioDownThresholdsDescription
data.value: Threshold level used for bearish audio alerts.

data.name: AudioAtBarCloseOnlyDescription
data.value: Trigger audio alerts only after the bar closes.

data.name: LabelTextColorDescription
data.value: Sets the color of the label text.

data.name: LabelLocationDescription
data.value: Specifies the display location of the label.

data.name: FontSettingDescription
data.value: Specifies various settings for the font.

data.name: DivergenceDotsDescription
data.value: Shows divergence markers on the price chart when bar direction and delta are opposite.

data.name: DivergenceBarsDescription
data.value: Highlights divergence bars in the Delta panel when bar direction and delta are opposite.

data.name: BarDirVsDeltaDivergenceDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display divergence, which occurs when the direction of the bar and the delta value are opposite: in the case of a bullish bar, the delta is negative, and in the case of a bearish bar, the delta is positive.

data.name: FixedNegMinorLevelDescription
data.value: Lower (in magnitude) threshold for negative delta.

data.name: FixedNegMajorLevelDescription
data.value: Upper (in magnitude) threshold for negative delta.

data.name: UpAlertFileFilterDescription
data.value: When activated, an alert is triggered in the presence of a ascending signal, utilizing the specified sound file name.

data.name: DownAlertFileFilterDescription
data.value: When activated, an alert is triggered in the presence of a downstream signal, utilizing the specified sound file name.

data.name: PositiveValueColorDescription
data.value: Displays the color of an element with a positive value.

data.name: NegativeValueColorDescription
data.value: Displays the color of an element with a negative value.

data.name: NeutralValueDescription
data.value: Represents the color used for neutral values

data.name: AbsorptionThresholdDesc
data.value: Minimum distance between the close and the delta extremes to consider absorption

data.name: LoloTextDesc
data.value: Paste levels in the legacy Lolo format (tokens separated by commas, labels joined with '&', optional '$TICKER:' prefix).

data.name: OnlyVisiblePriceRangeDesc
data.value: Draw only levels within the currently visible price range.

data.name: LastBarOnlyDesc
data.value: Draw levels only near the last bar instead of across the whole chart.

data.name: LabelAlignmentDesc
data.value: Controls whether labels are drawn on the left or right side.

data.name: ThickMaxRankDesc
data.value: Ranks up to this value use the thick tier.

data.name: MediumMaxRankDesc
data.value: Ranks up to this value use the medium tier. Higher ranks use the thin tier.

data.name: Show0DteHaloDesc
data.value: Highlights 0DTE levels using the legacy red halo style.

data.name: HaloWidthDesc
data.value: Width of the halo line drawn behind 0DTE levels.

data.name: Dash0DteDesc
data.value: Draws the main 0DTE level line as dashed (legacy behavior).

data.name: MenthorQTextDesc
data.value: Paste MenthorQ levels (label/price pairs separated by commas, optional '$TICKER:' prefix).

data.name: MenthorQOffsetDesc
data.value: Price offset applied to MenthorQ levels (use to align ES1! vs SPX). Can be positive or negative.

data.name: PenLargeGammaDesc
data.value: Line style for Large Gamma (LG / GEX n). Primary gamma levels.

data.name: PenVolTriggerDesc
data.value: Line style for Volatility Trigger (VT / HVL). Forward-looking volatility level.

data.name: PenCallWallDesc
data.value: Line style for Call Wall (CW). Options-positioning based resistance.

data.name: PenPutWallDesc
data.value: Line style for Put Wall (PW). Options-positioning based support.

data.name: PenZeroGammaDesc
data.value: Line style for Zero Gamma (ZG). Gamma reference level.

data.name: PenBlindLevelDesc
data.value: Line style for Blind Spots (BL n). Predictive reaction zones (not classic S/R): built from options positioning, momentum and cross-asset correlation. Use for confluence, risk and targets.

data.name: PenDayMinDesc
data.value: Line style for “1D Min”. Lower bound of the 1D expected move range (options + forward-looking volatility). Can act as reversal/target zone and stop reference.

data.name: PenDayMaxDesc
data.value: Line style for “1D Max”. Upper bound of the 1D expected move range (options + forward-looking volatility). Breaks outside the range often expand volatility.

data.name: PenRiskTriggerDesc
data.value: Line style for Swing Model Risk Trigger (RT) (5D/20D). Pivot/inflection where momentum may flip; useful for risk, timing and targets.

data.name: PenLowerBandDesc
data.value: Line style for Swing Model Lower Band (LB) (5D/20D). Lower bound of multi-day expected range; often acts as support/pullback entry (bullish bias).

data.name: PenUpperBandDesc
data.value: Line style for Swing Model Upper Band (UB) (5D/20D). Upper bound of multi-day expected range; often acts as resistance/TP or fade zone (bearish bias).

data.name: PenOtherDesc
data.value: Fallback line style for unknown or unmapped labels.

data.name: Pen0DteAccentDesc
data.value: Thin dotted overlay for high-priority 0DTE levels (LG/PW/CW) up to ThickMaxRank.

data.name: MenthorQIndexTextDesc
data.value: Paste levels referenced to an index (e.g., SPX, NDX or QQQ). The indicator converts them to the futures contract by applying the configured Offset.

data.name: MenthorQFuturesTextDesc
data.value: Paste levels already expressed in the futures contract (e.g., ES or NQ). The indicator uses them directly, without applying any Offset.

data.name: SourceTruthDesc
data.value: Defines which source takes precedence when the same level concept appears at different prices across multiple sources.

data.name: SourceTruth_DefaultDesc
data.value: Lolo levels take precedence, followed by MenthorQ Futures and MenthorQ Index.

data.name: SourceTruth_PreferLoloDesc
data.value: Lolo levels are always preferred over other sources when conflicts occur.

data.name: SourceTruth_PreferMenthorQFuturesDesc
data.value: MenthorQ Futures levels are preferred over Lolo and MenthorQ Index when conflicts occur.

data.name: SourceTruth_PreferMenthorQIndexDesc
data.value: MenthorQ Index levels are preferred over Lolo and MenthorQ Futures when conflicts occur.

data.name: ProfitColorDescription
data.value: Color used to display profitable trades.

data.name: LossColorDescription
data.value: Color used to display losing trades.

data.name: LabelDistanceDescription
data.value: Vertical spacing between trade markers and labels (px).

data.name: LabelXAnchorDescription
data.value: Defines the horizontal reference used to position trade labels.

data.name: LabelModeDescription
data.value: Selects how trade labels are displayed.

data.name: TradeLineDescription
data.value: Draws a line connecting entry and exit markers.

data.name: TradeDetailsDescription
data.value: Shows trade details when hovering markers or labels.

data.name: CustomSessionStartDescription
data.value: Specifies the start of the custom session

data.name: SessionModeDescription
data.value: Enables or disables session-based delta calculation mode.

data.name: SessionCumModeDescription
data.value: Controls when session cumulative values are reset (Session Volume/Delta/Delta per Volume) and resets Delta Change at the start of a new session.

data.name: EnableTrailingDrawdownDescription
data.value: Enable trailing drawdown tracking based on peak equity.

data.name: MaxTrailingDrawdownDescription
data.value: Maximum allowed trailing drawdown from peak equity (absolute currency amount).

data.name: TrailingInitializationModeDescription
data.value: Defines how Start/Peak equity are initialized (manual stop equity or current equity).

data.name: TrailingManualStopEquityDescription
data.value: Bootstrap stop equity for funded accounts. Used only when Initialization Mode is ManualStopEquity.

data.name: ReinitializeNowDescription
data.value: Forces trailing drawdown state re-initialization on next render.

data.name: TrailingPeakUpdateModeDescription
data.value: Realtime updates Peak Equity continuously; EndOfDay updates Peak Equity only once per day at the configured EOD time.

data.name: TrailingEodTimeLocalDescription
data.value: End-of-day time used when Peak Update Mode is EndOfDay. Captures Peak Equity once per day after this time.

data.name: EnableMonthlyResetDescription
data.value: Resets trailing drawdown state on a fixed day of each month (per account).

data.name: MonthlyResetDayDescription
data.value: Day of month when trailing drawdown resets (1–31). If the day exceeds month length, the last day is used.

data.name: DailyResetModeDescription
data.value: Defines when daily session metrics and rails reset. NewYork1700 uses a 17:00 session cut (chart local time); LocalCustomTime uses the local time configured below.

data.name: DailyResetTimeLocalDescription
data.value: Local reset time used only when Daily Reset Mode is LocalCustomTime.

data.name: ShowTradesTodayRowDescription
data.value: Show the number of closed trades for the current trading day.

data.name: ShowWinsLossesTodayRowDescription
data.value: Show the number of winning and losing trades for the current trading day.

data.name: ShowCurrentStreakRowDescription
data.value: Show the current win or loss streak for the trading day.

data.name: ShowRealizedPnlTodayRowDescription
data.value: Show realized profit and loss for the current trading day.

data.name: EnableSoftRecommendationsDescription
data.value: Enables non-blocking trading discipline recommendations based on daily session metrics.

data.name: MaxTradesPerDayDescription
data.value: Maximum number of trades allowed for the trading day before a caution or stop recommendation is triggered.

data.name: MaxConsecutiveLossesDescription
data.value: Maximum allowed consecutive losing trades before a stop recommendation is suggested.

data.name: CautionTradesThresholdDescription
data.value: Number of trades at which a caution recommendation is shown before reaching the daily limit.

data.name: CautionLossesThresholdDescription
data.value: Number of consecutive losses at which a caution recommendation is shown before a stop is suggested.

data.name: ShowSuggestedStatusRowDescription
data.value: Show the suggested trading status (OK / CAUTION / STOP) based on today’s session metrics.

data.name: ShowStopReasonsRowDescription
data.value: Show the reasons that triggered a CAUTION or STOP suggestion.

data.name: ShowPositionSnapshotDescription
data.value: Shows a lightweight snapshot of the current open position (dir/qty/entry).

data.name: ShowFlatRowDescription
data.value: When no position is open, shows a FLAT row instead of position details.

data.name: EnableDailyRailsDescription
data.value: Enable hard daily risk limits (loss/profit/drawdown) per account-day.

data.name: DailyLossLimitDescription
data.value: Hard stop when equity falls below start-of-day equity by this amount.

data.name: DailyProfitTargetDescription
data.value: Hard stop when equity rises above start-of-day equity by this amount.

data.name: DailyMaxDrawdownFromPeakDescription
data.value: Hard stop when equity falls below today's peak equity by this amount.

data.name: CautionLossFromStartDescription
data.value: Show CAUTION when equity is down by this amount from start-of-day equity (0 = off).

data.name: CautionGivebackFromPeakDescription
data.value: Show CAUTION when equity gives back this amount from today's peak equity (0 = off).

data.name: CautionLossFromStartPctDescription
data.value: Show CAUTION when equity is down by this percent from start-of-day equity (0 = off).

data.name: CautionGivebackFromPeakPctDescription
data.value: Show CAUTION when equity gives back this percent from today's peak equity (0 = off).

data.name: ShowRemainingDailyLossRowDescription
data.value: Show how much room is left before the daily loss limit (based on current equity).

data.name: ShowRemainingDailyProfitTargetRowDescription
data.value: Show how much is left to reach the daily profit target (based on current equity).

data.name: CautionTradesPctDescription
data.value: Triggers CAUTION when today's trade count reaches this percentage of Max Trades Per Day (e.g., 0.75 = 75%).

data.name: CautionRemainingDailyLossPctDescription
data.value: Triggers CAUTION when remaining daily loss is below this percentage of the daily loss limit.

data.name: EnableConsistencyRulesDescription
data.value: Enables payout concentration checks (CAUTION/STOP) based on the payout objective.

data.name: PayoutObjectiveDescription
data.value: Target payout used by consistency rules to compute CAUTION/STOP thresholds.

data.name: ConsistencyCautionPctDescription
data.value: Triggers CAUTION when today's realized PnL reaches this percentage of the payout objective.

data.name: ConsistencyStopPctDescription
data.value: Triggers STOP when today's realized PnL reaches this percentage of the payout objective.

data.name: EnableGivebackCautionDescription
data.value: Enables CAUTION when today's PnL gives back too much from the intraday peak.

data.name: GivebackPctOfProfitTarget
data.value: Giveback CAUTION (% of daily profit target)

data.name: GivebackPctOfProfitTargetDescription
data.value: Giveback threshold as a percentage of the daily profit target (used when Daily Profit Target > 0).

data.name: GivebackAbsDescription
data.value: Absolute giveback threshold used when Daily Profit Target is 0.

data.name: CautionOneLossAway
data.value: CAUTION: one loss away from max consecutive losses.

data.name: CautionRemainingDailyLossLow
data.value: CAUTION: remaining daily loss is low.

data.name: ShowTrailingStartEquityRowDescription
data.value: Shows the trailing drawdown start equity row.

data.name: ShowTrailingPeakEquityRowDescription
data.value: Shows the trailing drawdown peak equity row.

data.name: ShowTrailingStopEquityRowDescription
data.value: Shows the trailing drawdown stop equity row.

data.name: ShowTrailingRemainingDdRowDescription
data.value: Shows remaining drawdown to the trailing stop equity.

data.name: ShowTrailingCurrentDdRowDescription
data.value: Shows current drawdown from the trailing peak equity.

data.name: ShowTradeMaxOpenPnlCurrentRowDescription
data.value: Shows the max open PnL for the current trade (while in position).

data.name: ShowTradeMaxOpenPnlLastRowDescription
data.value: Shows the max open PnL for the last closed trade (while flat).

data.name: ShowLastClosedTradePnlRowDescription
data.value: Shows the realized PnL of the last closed trade (while flat).
